name: BigQuery dataset not using customer-managed encryption key
description: This BigQuery dataset is encrypted with a Google-managed key rather than a customer-managed encryption key (CMEK). Using CMEK gives you control over the encryption key lifecycle, enabling you to revoke access instantly by disabling or destroying the key.
remediation: Configure a Cloud KMS CMEK for the BigQuery dataset. Create a KMS key ring and key, grant the BigQuery service account the cloudkms.cryptoKeyEncrypterDecrypter role, then set the default encryption key on the dataset.
